style.name: 阳光超现实新闻地图拼贴
style.introZh: 今日主视觉采用阳光超现实新闻地图拼贴：金色日光、漂浮地图、球场弧线、报纸纹理与清晰信息块，把世界杯、台海、热浪、战争、移民、地震与萨赫勒安全放进同一张明亮但有重量的世界地图。
style.introEn: Today uses a sunny surreal news-atlas collage: golden light, floating maps, football arcs, newspaper texture and clear information blocks, placing football, Taiwan, heat, war, migration, earthquakes and Sahel security into one bright but weighty world map.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 摩洛哥晋级八强，台海巡航、美国热浪、基辅搜救、移民呼吁、委内瑞拉救灾、马里袭击与伊朗国葬同日推进
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界不是只在比赛里淘汰，也在现实里筛选韧性
zh-CN.headlineFull: 摩洛哥晋级八强，台海巡航、美国热浪、基辅搜救、移民呼吁、委内瑞拉救灾、马里袭击与伊朗国葬同日推进；世界不是只在比赛里淘汰，也在现实里筛选韧性。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯淘汰赛开启16强阶段，摩洛哥3:0击败东道主加拿大，率先进入八强。场外，中国海警在台湾以东启动巡航，美国独立日活动被极端高温打乱，基辅继续清理俄袭废墟，教宗良十四世在兰佩杜萨呼吁保护移民，委内瑞拉地震救援继续，马里多地遭袭，伊朗举行哈梅内伊国葬。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的共同线索是韧性：球场看比分，现实看系统还能不能撑住。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 一边淘汰赛，一边救援队，一边高温预警，世界日报很难轻松。

en-US.headlineFact: Morocco reach the quarter-finals as Taiwan patrols, US heat, Kyiv rescue work, migration appeals, Venezuela relief, Mali attacks and Iran mourning move together
en-US.headlineView: the world is not only eliminating teams; it is testing resilience
en-US.headlineFull: Morocco reach the quarter-finals as Taiwan patrols, US heat, Kyiv rescue work, migration appeals, Venezuela relief, Mali attacks and Iran mourning move together; the world is not only eliminating teams; it is testing resilience.
en-US.intro: Over the past 24 hours, Morocco beat co-hosts Canada 3-0 to become the first World Cup quarter-finalist. Beyond football, China launched patrols east of Taiwan, extreme heat disrupted US Independence Day events, Kyiv rescue work continued after a deadly Russian strike, Pope Leo appealed for migrant protection in Lampedusa, Venezuela kept counting earthquake losses, Mali faced coordinated attacks and Iran held funeral ceremonies for Ali Khamenei.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The common thread is resilience: sport keeps score, reality tests whether systems hold.
en-US.doudouQuote: Knockout games, rescue teams and heat alerts make for a heavy daily brief.

sources.title: Daily ChatGPT hotspot source verified and corrected by Codex

zh-CN.headlineFact: 摩洛哥3:0击败加拿大，成为本届世界杯首支八强球队
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是主场故事也必须服从实力
zh-CN.headlineFull: 摩洛哥3:0击败加拿大，成为本届世界杯首支八强球队；淘汰赛最残酷的地方，是主场故事也必须服从实力。
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间7月4日05:00至7月5日05:00，世界杯16强赛窗口内最明确的赛果是摩洛哥3:0击败加拿大。奥纳希下半场梅开二度，拉希米补时锁定胜局。加拿大作为东道主之一结束旅程，摩洛哥连续两届世界杯闯入八强。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛不奖励故事线，只奖励在关键时刻把机会打进去的人。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 东道主剧本没写完，摩洛哥直接把下一章拿走了。

en-US.headlineFact: Morocco beat Canada 3-0 to become the first 2026 World Cup quarter-finalist
en-US.headlineView: knockout football makes even a host-nation story answer to quality
en-US.headlineFull: Morocco beat Canada 3-0 to become the first 2026 World Cup quarter-finalist; knockout football makes even a host-nation story answer to quality.
en-US.intro: In the Beijing-time window from 05:00 July 4 to 05:00 July 5, the clear World Cup result was Morocco 3-0 Canada. Azzedine Ounahi scored twice after halftime and Soufiane Rahimi sealed the win in stoppage time, ending Canada’s home run and sending Morocco to a second straight quarter-final.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Knockout games do not reward narratives; they reward execution under pressure.
en-US.doudouQuote: Canada had the home script. Morocco took the next chapter.

sources.title: Canada 0-3 Morocco: FIFA World Cup 2026 as it happened

zh-CN.headlineFact: 中国海警在台湾以东启动巡航，台湾批评其为挑衅
zh-CN.headlineView: 压力测试不一定开火，也可以是每天把边界往前推一点
zh-CN.headlineFull: 中国海警在台湾以东启动巡航，台湾批评其为挑衅；压力测试不一定开火，也可以是每天把边界往前推一点。
zh-CN.intro: 中国海警宣布在台湾以东海域开展巡航，并称将加强相关水域执法。台湾方面批评这是挑衅举动，相关动向也引发国际关注。台海紧张常常不是突然爆发，而是在巡航、执法、军演和外交表态中逐步累积压力。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 地缘政治的危险，有时不在一声巨响，而在边界感被一点点磨薄。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 每天多走一步，地图上的线就越来越紧。

en-US.headlineFact: China launched coast guard patrols east of Taiwan, drawing criticism from Taipei
en-US.headlineView: a pressure test does not need gunfire; it can move the boundary a little each day
en-US.headlineFull: China launched coast guard patrols east of Taiwan, drawing criticism from Taipei; a pressure test does not need gunfire; it can move the boundary a little each day.
en-US.intro: China said its coast guard had begun patrols east of Taiwan and would strengthen law enforcement in waters it claims. Taiwan criticised the move as provocative, adding another layer to a pattern of patrols, drills and diplomatic pressure around the island.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The danger in geopolitics can be a boundary being worn thinner day by day.
en-US.doudouQuote: One more patrol, one tighter map line.

sources.title: China launches coast guard patrol east of Taiwan despite international pushback

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国独立日活动遭热浪打乱，电网与城市服务承压
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候风险最现实的时刻，是节日也不得不为温度让路
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国独立日活动遭热浪打乱，电网与城市服务承压；气候风险最现实的时刻，是节日也不得不为温度让路。
zh-CN.intro: 美国东部热浪打乱多地独立日活动，华盛顿特区游行被取消，部分庆典、集市和户外活动调整或暂停。报道显示，高温和风暴同时影响出行、电力和公共安全，说明极端天气已经开始改变城市如何组织大型公共活动。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 气候变化不是抽象议题，而是游行取消、急救增加、电网吃紧。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 连烟花都得先看温度计脸色。

en-US.headlineFact: Extreme heat disrupted July Fourth events and strained power grids across the US
en-US.headlineView: climate risk becomes real when even a national holiday has to yield to temperature
en-US.headlineFull: Extreme heat disrupted July Fourth events and strained power grids across the US; climate risk becomes real when even a national holiday has to yield to temperature.
en-US.intro: A heat wave disrupted Independence Day events across the eastern United States, with Washington DC cancelling its parade and other fairs or outdoor gatherings delayed or adjusted. Heat and storms strained transport, power and public safety systems.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Climate change is not abstract when parades are cancelled, medics are busy and grids are strained.
en-US.doudouQuote: Even fireworks now check the thermometer first.

sources.title: Heat wave disrupts Fourth of July events across US, strains power grids

zh-CN.headlineFact: 基辅俄袭死亡人数升至30人，救援人员继续清理废墟
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争最冷的统计，是城市一边点名一边等待回应
zh-CN.headlineFull: 基辅俄袭死亡人数升至30人，救援人员继续清理废墟；战争最冷的统计，是城市一边点名一边等待回应。
zh-CN.intro: 乌克兰国家紧急服务部门表示，俄罗斯对基辅的大规模袭击死亡人数升至30人，近百人受伤，搜救仍在继续。基辅此前已为今年最致命的首都袭击进入哀悼。远程导弹和无人机袭击正在反复把城市生活拖回战争中心。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 战争不是新闻地图上的箭头，而是每一栋楼里突然消失的日常。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 希望废墟下面还有好消息。

en-US.headlineFact: The death toll from Russia’s Kyiv attack rose to 30 as rescue work continued
en-US.headlineView: the coldest statistic of war is a city calling names and waiting for answers
en-US.headlineFull: The death toll from Russia’s Kyiv attack rose to 30 as rescue work continued; the coldest statistic of war is a city calling names and waiting for answers.
en-US.intro: Ukraine’s emergency service said the death toll from Russia’s large attack on Kyiv had risen to 30, with nearly 100 injured and rescue work continuing. The capital had already observed mourning after its deadliest strike this year.
en-US.xiaziQuote: War is not only arrows on a map; it is ordinary life disappearing inside buildings.
en-US.doudouQuote: May the rubble still return some good news.

sources.title: Death toll rises to 30 in Russian attack on Kyiv

zh-CN.headlineFact: 教宗良十四世在兰佩杜萨呼吁保护、接纳和帮助移民
zh-CN.headlineView: 迁徙问题考验的不是口号，而是边界与尊严能否同时存在
zh-CN.headlineFull: 教宗良十四世在兰佩杜萨呼吁保护、接纳和帮助移民；迁徙问题考验的不是口号，而是边界与尊严能否同时存在。
zh-CN.intro: 教宗良十四世在美国独立日访问意大利兰佩杜萨岛，纪念在地中海迁徙途中遇难者，并呼吁欧洲与美国欢迎、保护和帮助移民。兰佩杜萨长期是非洲移民抵达欧洲的重要入口，移民议题继续考验边境治理、人道救援和社会接纳。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 一个社会如何对待抵达边界的人，常常暴露它如何理解自己。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 边界要管理，人也要被当成人。

en-US.headlineFact: Pope Leo used a Lampedusa visit to call for migrant protection and welcome
en-US.headlineView: migration tests whether borders and dignity can coexist
en-US.headlineFull: Pope Leo used a Lampedusa visit to call for migrant protection and welcome; migration tests whether borders and dignity can coexist.
en-US.intro: Pope Leo XIV visited Lampedusa on US Independence Day, honouring migrants who died crossing the Mediterranean and urging Europe and the United States to welcome, protect and assist migrants. The island remains a symbolic gateway for arrivals from Africa.
en-US.xiaziQuote: How a society treats people at its border reveals how it understands itself.
en-US.doudouQuote: Manage the border, but do not misplace the human being.

sources.title: Pope urges protection, integration of migrants on visit to island frontier

zh-CN.headlineFact: 委内瑞拉双震救援继续，死亡和失踪数字仍在上升
zh-CN.headlineView: 灾难第二阶段，最难的是把救援变成长期安置
zh-CN.headlineFull: 委内瑞拉双震救援继续，死亡和失踪数字仍在上升；灾难第二阶段，最难的是把救援变成长期安置。
zh-CN.intro: 委内瑞拉双重地震后的搜救和安置仍在继续。多家报道显示，死亡、受伤和无家可归人数仍在更新，国际救援人员与本地工作人员继续参与医疗救治、废墟搜救和临时安置。对灾区而言，真正漫长的阶段刚刚开始。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 灾害从来不只是一瞬间的破坏，后面还有医疗、住所、秩序和心理重建。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 救援快一点，统计数字就少一点冰冷。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：委内瑞拉地震。

en-US.headlineFact: Rescue and shelter work continued after Venezuela’s twin earthquakes
en-US.headlineView: the second stage of disaster is turning rescue into long-term shelter
en-US.headlineFull: Rescue and shelter work continued after Venezuela’s twin earthquakes; the second stage of disaster is turning rescue into long-term shelter.
en-US.intro: Search, medical and shelter work continued after Venezuela’s twin earthquakes. Reports showed casualty, injury and displacement figures still being updated as local workers and international rescue teams handled treatment, debris searches and temporary housing.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A disaster is not only the moment of damage; it is medicine, shelter, order and recovery afterward.
en-US.doudouQuote: The faster relief moves, the less cold the numbers feel.

sources.title: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes latest death toll and rescue reports

zh-CN.headlineFact: 马里多地遭武装袭击，军方称局势仍有威胁
zh-CN.headlineView: 安全承诺最怕的不是一次失败，而是反复被现实验证
zh-CN.headlineFull: 马里多地遭武装袭击，军方称局势仍有威胁；安全承诺最怕的不是一次失败，而是反复被现实验证。
zh-CN.intro: 路透社报道，马里武装人员在至少五个地点发动袭击，目标包括北部有政府军与俄罗斯人员驻扎的城镇，以及靠近首都巴马科南部的地区。军方称已采取行动，但也承认威胁仍然存在。萨赫勒安全危机仍在向政治稳定施压。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当一个国家需要反复证明“局势受控”，往往说明控制本身已经很脆。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 安全感不能只靠公告，得靠晚上真的安静。

en-US.headlineFact: Insurgents attacked multiple locations in Mali as the army said the threat remained
en-US.headlineView: security promises are weakest when reality keeps retesting them
en-US.headlineFull: Insurgents attacked multiple locations in Mali as the army said the threat remained; security promises are weakest when reality keeps retesting them.
en-US.intro: Reuters reported insurgent attacks in at least five locations in Mali, including a northern town hosting government and Russian fighters and an area south of Bamako. The army said it had disrupted attackers but warned the threat was still present.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When a state must keep proving control, control itself is already fragile.
en-US.doudouQuote: Security is not an announcement; it is a quiet night.

sources.title: Insurgents attack multiple towns in northern and central Mali, sources say

zh-CN.headlineFact: 伊朗为哈梅内伊举行多日国葬，悼念也成为权力展示
zh-CN.headlineView: 国葬既是告别，也是新秩序对外亮相
zh-CN.headlineFull: 伊朗为哈梅内伊举行多日国葬，悼念也成为权力展示；国葬既是告别，也是新秩序对外亮相。
zh-CN.intro: 伊朗为前最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊举行多日国葬和悼念活动，德黑兰出现大规模人群与强烈政治口号。葬礼既承载宗教与国家哀悼，也成为新权力结构展示稳定、动员支持者和回应外部压力的公共舞台。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 国葬表面看的是灵柩，深层看的是谁站位、谁发声、谁接住权力。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 悼念很安静，政治一点都不安静。

en-US.headlineFact: Iran held multi-day funeral ceremonies for Ali Khamenei
en-US.headlineView: a state funeral is farewell and a public staging of the next order
en-US.headlineFull: Iran held multi-day funeral ceremonies for Ali Khamenei; a state funeral is farewell and a public staging of the next order.
en-US.intro: Iran held multi-day funeral ceremonies for former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, with large crowds and political slogans in Tehran. The mourning also served as a public display of continuity, mobilisation and defiance under pressure.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A state funeral shows the coffin on the surface and the power map underneath.
en-US.doudouQuote: Mourning can be quiet. Politics rarely is.

sources.title: Crowds gather as six-day funeral for former Iranian supreme leader begins
